developer_response.body: Thanks for being part of GRO and for spending so much time in the game already. ❤️ The authentication issue you encountered was related to a maintenance period that temporarily affected player access. The maintenance has now been completed, and players should be able to jump back in and continue their adventures. If you're still having trouble getting into the game, please join our Discord at https://discord.gg/gro and we'll be happy to help you get back online. We appreciate your patience and hope to see you back in GRO soon!

reviews.review_description: This game is like Grow A Garden and Plants Vs Zombies combined. You have to buy crops, sell fruit, and defend your garden from the critters. If you let the critters get to your garden they will eat your plants. You can buy defenders to protect your garden. Currently there is a rocket corn and a pea shooter defender. If you don’t have any defenders you can hit a critter three times with a shovel, and you will get some plucks. It includes a whole 18 seeds right now! Some of the seeds are hard to get but you can join the Discord and it tells you when good seeds are in stock like the prismatic Jelly Beanstalk. If you ever get bored, ask someone nicely to play with you because the community is nice which will almost guarantee you a friend in every lobby! The community is currently really nice with some mean people here and there but that is why they have the GRO Police Force. The GRO Police Force bans those that violate the rules. GRO also made the GRO Relief Squad. The GRO Relief Squad really helps out New players and people that need money, land, or gear. Land is what you can plant your crops on. There is common, uncommon, rare, and epic land currently. The better the land, the bigger fruit which will make it cost even more! Gear consists of backpacks, shovels, watering cans, sprinklers, umbrellas, and even hookshots which let you swing everywhere. They even do Admin Abuse weekly, normally on Saturday at 2 PM EST. That’s basically it for GRO, but updates are normally every other week so the game will get better and better! The overall rating I would give GRO is a 5/5 stars. Highly Recommend!

Even if your headset dies, you keep the items you're holding. And if not, you get your plucks back thank you. Sincerely: meta master 23

developer_response.body:
We are sad that you couldn't play GRO. But the game was in early testing at that time and we had to limit the number of players to safely grow the game.
 
The good news here is starting this weekend, any player who wants to play can jump in. The button has been removed. We are now confident that the game is safe and stable for all players. We would love to have you in game and we hope you would enjoy playing GRO.
 
Take care
Team GRO

I love GRO VR because it is a fun and creative game that always gives me something to do. I enjoy growing plants, collecting cool items, exploring different areas, and spending time with friends. The game is relaxing but also exciting because there are always new things to discover. One of the best parts of GRO VR is its community. The players are friendly, helpful, and welcoming to both new and experienced players. People often help each other, share tips, and make the game more enjoyable for everyone. The great gameplay and kind community are the reasons why I love GRO VR so much.i also love playing GRO VR because it is a fun game where I can explore, grow plants, collect items, and spend time with friends. There is always something to do, and every time I play it feels like a new adventure. The game is easy to enjoy, and it keeps me coming back because of all the cool things I can discover.
The GRO VR community is also one of the best parts of the game. Most players are kind, helpful, and welcoming to new people. Players often help each other learn the game, share ideas, and have fun together. The friendly community makes GRO VR a great place to hang out and enjoy playing with others. A few more things I love about the game is the kind people who apply to be a grs (Gro relief squad) or gpf (Gro police force) they really help the community with everything like bullying, saying slurs, making people uncomfortable, Etc! I am actually a grs myself! I love helping new people or kids that aren't that good to get money and stuff! Thank you for reading my review and bye! 👋

This game is one of if not THE best gorilla game i have ever played

It's like Bwah and has the style of UG, but its INFINITELY better than both of those games. GRO has PVS mechanics so you can buy defender plants (2 at the time of this review being made) to defend against the critters who want to eat your plants. And please do not leave a bad review because of modders, Gro devs are trying their hardest to get rid of them!

GRO VR Review

GRO VR is one of the most fun and welcoming VR games I’ve played. The gameplay is exciting, creative, and keeps me coming back because there’s always something new to do. The developers clearly put a lot of effort into making the game enjoyable and keeping it updated for players.

What really makes GRO VR special is the community. The players are friendly, supportive, and always willing to help newcomers learn the game. Whether you’re exploring, hanging out with friends, or meeting new people, the community makes every session more enjoyable. It’s easy to make friends and have memorable experiences because of how positive and active everyone is.

The game itself runs well, looks great in VR, and offers a unique experience that stands out from many other VR games. The combination of fun gameplay, regular updates, and an amazing community makes GRO VR a game I highly recommend.

Rating: 5/5 Stars ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

GRO VR isn’t just a game—it’s a community where players can have fun, make friends, and create unforgettable memories together.
